prompt: Single-frame composition using ukiyo-e grammar: flat indigo planes, strong contour lines, diagonal wave bands stepping toward a calm basin, visible paper grain, muted ochre sky, no text.
tradition_approach: Used flat color planes, contour-led wave forms, visible grain, asymmetrical diagonals, and a restrained indigo-ochre palette so the descent reads through ukiyo-e spatial logic rather than modern shading.
